content.en:
In short, Ye Tian had to keep a low profile.

Unless he has the strength to ignore other Eternal Dao Realms, such as surpassing the Eternal Dao Realm, he will dare to expose his perfect-level Eternal Dao Species.

"Brother Xuehe, there is Liuhu Gold in the abyss of the demon seed?"

Ye Tian asked.

"Yes!" Xue He nodded, "The Demon Seed Abyss is a very strange treasure land, but this treasure land is too suitable for the Eternal Demon Seed Eternal Dao, so they stay there, instinctively cultivate, and their strength will gradually increase, gradually, the Demon Seed Abyss is extremely suitable for them to survive, and even has a special change." In an Eternal Dao Realm like the Lord of the Ancient Realm, the problem of the Eternal Dao Seed is very big, and he does not dare to enter the Demon Seed Abyss at all, otherwise the Eternal Dao Seed problem will be infinitely magnified, and it may even be directly demonized. "

"So, the lord of the ancient kingdom took the acquisition method to acquire the Liuhu gold?"

Ye Tiandao.

"Hmm!"

At this moment, Ye Tian understood.

However, he does need Nine Pole Points, and he also needs the resources to complete the Eternal Dao Body, this Demon Seed Abyss, he must go to.

As for Xue He's reminder, he naturally didn't care.

After all, he was different from other Eternal Supreme Dao Realms, other Eternal Supreme Dao Realms only had one life, and he had countless lives.

......

On the edge of the Ancient Realm, where it intersects with the Ancient Cloud Realm, this is where the Demon Seed Abyss is located.

Ye Tian's duplicate body kept shuttling, and it took a while before he arrived here.

When Ye Tian came here, he found that there were dense formations arranged here, and there were also some Eternal Dao Realms repairing the formations.

Obviously, this place should have been breached not long ago, causing the formation to be damaged, which needs to be repaired.

After Ye Tian came here, he directly revealed his identity as a member of the Nine Extremes Alliance, and went in directly.

Otherwise, he'll have to go through at least one layer of vetting.

After coming here, Ye Tian knew that the protection of the Demon Seed Abyss was extremely strict, with three defensive circles, the first defensive circle was often broken, and the second defensive circle was probably hundreds of millions of years before it could be broken once.

As for the third ring of defense, it is almost impossible to break.

Not long ago, however, the second circle of defense was broken, but not the third.

If the third defensive circle is really broken, I am afraid that all the masters of the Nine Extremes Alliance will come here to stop these demon seeds.

Ye Tian passed through the defensive circles, and then came to the entrance of the Demon Seed Abyss.

From the outside world, the abyss of the demon seed was pitch black, and even with Ye Tian's perception, he couldn't perceive it too far.

And on the first defensive circle, dense formations and many palace fortresses guarded here, and a large number of Eternal Dao Realms were stationed here for a long time.

These Eternal Dao Realms are all Eternal Dao Realms from various realms, and they are all forcibly ordered to be stationed here.

Only a few Eternal Dao Realms took the initiative to come here.

For example, Ye Tian took the initiative to come here.

......

Wow!

Ye Tian directly entered the Demon Seed Abyss, and then reined in his aura.

"The weakest estimate of the demon seed in the demon seed abyss is equivalent to the strong person who has completed the transformation of the eternal Dao body, and the weakness of the demon seed is that it is unable to cast the secret technique of the Dao seed, after all, they have all lost their wisdom, but even so, relying on the power of the demon seed, they can still exert a very terrifying combat power. With my current strength, I'm afraid I won't be able to kill too powerful demon seeds, so I can only deal with the weakest demon seeds. Ye Tian said darkly.

After all, he is a powerhouse who condenses the perfection-level Eternal Dao Species, and he has deduced many Dao Secret Techniques, plus he is taking the path of the strongest Dao, and now his physical body is extremely terrifying, and his strength is naturally no less than that of a powerhouse who has completed the transformation of the Eternal Dao body.

But what the combat effectiveness will be, we have to try to know.

Of course.

Ye Tian's goal is not to find these demon seeds, but to find treasure resources, which is his purpose.

"I'm afraid that the resources near the Demon Seed Abyss have long been found, and if you want to find good things, you must go deep into the Demon Seed Abyss!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

So, he continued to go deeper, stopped in a relatively safe place, and then condensed the second replica body, so as to avoid the fall, he had to resend the replica body over, which would easily expose his doppelganger problem.

Gradually, Ye Tian went deep into the abyss of the demon seed.

Suddenly.

Ye Tian encountered a demon seed.

This demon seed is still in human form, but its appearance has changed greatly, and it is extremely hideous, exuding a black demon seed aura

In addition to not being able to cast the secret technique of the Dao Seed, the power of the Demon Seed seems to be stronger.

This is three times stronger blackening and three points weaker than whitewashing!

Of course, if you don't know how to use secret techniques, your combat effectiveness will drop significantly, and there will be no blackening that is three times stronger.

Rumble!!!!

Ye Tian fought with this demon seed.

"Sunrise Domain!"

The power of the Eternal Dao Seed turned into a realm and suppressed this demon seed.

However, the speed power of this demon seed is still terrifying.

"Prison of the Sun!"

The realm shrank, turning into a prison that trapped the demon seed.

However, the other party's strength was really too terrifying, and he tore through the prison and rushed directly towards Ye Tian.

Ye Tian condensed the spear of the ruin sun, and blessed his body with the ruin sun immortal cover, and moved with the ruin sun aurora to fight against it.

Thundered!!!

Under the continuous attack, this demon seed still resisted Ye Tian's attack, and Ye Tian's attack could not break through the opponent's defense.

"This demon seed is not simple, the cultivation should be a second-class eternal dao species, but the eternal dao body has definitely reached the realm of Xiaocheng, and now after the demonization of the eternal dao species, the physical body has become strong, and it is definitely comparable to the eternal dao species of the Dacheng realm. "

This demon seed can't hurt Ye Tian, but if Ye Tian wants to kill him, it's more troublesome.

Unless he besieges him with multiple duplicate bodies, he can be killed.

However, there is no need for that.

It's no good to kill the demon seed, and it will delay time, and maybe it will attract other demon seeds.

Thereupon.

Ye Tian directly escaped with the Aurora of the Ruin Sun and got rid of this demon seed.

Soon, Ye Tian successfully got rid of the demon seed and left this place.

After that, he searched everywhere and found good things.

"Nine Xuan Black Lotus!"

The Nine Xuan Black Lotus grows on a black lake, emitting a dazzling black light.

If he remembered correctly, the Nine Xuan Black Lotus was worth 600 Nine Pole Points, and many Eternal Dao Realms were acquiring it.

Wow!

Ye Tian shuttled over, and he was about to capture the Nine Xuan Black Lotus.

Suddenly.

A black dragon appeared and intercepted Ye Tian.
